## Governance change summary

### Invariant impact statement (required)
Describe how this PR preserves architecture invariants or explicitly list which invariant is intentionally changed and why.

### Trust zone declaration (required)
List all trust zones touched by this PR and confirm that no higher-trust zone depends on lower-trust material.

### Provenance note update (required)
Identify every file whose provenance note was added or updated. If no provenance note changed, explain why.

### Deprecation plan (required when replacing existing structures)
If this PR replaces or supersedes an existing structure, specify:
- what is being deprecated
- where migration guidance lives
- planned removal or sunset timing

## Drift check (required)

### Old rule preserved
State the pre-existing governance rule this change keeps intact.

### Intentional change
State exactly what changed by design.

### Unchanged surface
State what remains explicitly unchanged.

## Validation
- [ ] I ran relevant local validations and included results in the PR conversation.
